item.title: Husband and I didn't agree politically
item.description:
Back story: Husband and I are high school sweethearts. Been together 11 years, married almost 3 years. We have twin 1 & 1/2 year olds, a boy and girl. My family has not been untouched by the darkness in the world. At 4 years old I was raped by my father. At 14 years old I was raped again by a masked man who was never caught. That rape resulted in a pregnancy that could have killed me. Before I had to make the choice to have an abortion, I miscarried the fetus. Just the miscarriage left me in the hospital for a long while. (Caused a lot of health complications) was told then I'd never have kids. That year I met my then boyfriend. Fast forward to fall of 2019 just before COVID: We got married and by January we were pregnant and excited. (I have always been very political, I always vote even for the small town elections. My husband is not very political and never really talks about it.) I started bringing up political things because now I have children. I want the world to be better for them. Find out my husband and his family are all Trump supporters. I started feeling scared and depressed that I got married into a potentially bad/dangerous family. Worried that my husband would be okay with the abortion ban. I was worried about bringing up the topic. But I know I want to live in a safe state for my family. Brought up the topic and he Surprised me by showing me all the research he is doing about what states or pro-choice and that he is looking into jobs in each state and is even talking about potentially trying to move to Canada. ***Update*** I forgot to say, my husband is no longer a Trump supporter, ever since we had our daughter. Thankfully he is no longer listening to his Father on political issues. (Not because I forced any of my views on him. I am a big believer of everyone having their own opinions, no matter how wrong they are/s.) Also we intend to wait to make any decisions until the end of the year. We plan to vote in the upcoming elections and see where things are and then make a plan. I want to thank everyone for the advice and up votes! Stay weird imgur! **Update #two** It baffles my mind that in 6 hours over 100,000 people saw this post I thought would die in usersub as all my other posts have. Thank you for your comments, your advice and the free internet points! **Update #3** I was worried that I would cause an argument by bringing up the topic of moving. I was raised by a single mom who believes that women aren't supposed to have a voice or opinions. So I've always had a hard time expressing myself around family or loved ones. My husband has been working on helping me be more expensive and talking about things but it is still something I struggle with. He is a good man and only wants the best for my twins and I.
The last few things that made me chuckle
item.dc:creator: Savage9613

item.title: Oldest host in the park
item.description: When I was 14 years old, I was abused by an older man. It went on for years. I am now 31 years old. I tucked the trauma into a corner of my mind and never spoke about it. Last week, I found out that this man is still abusing girls. Saying the same things to them, grooming them the same way. I found a 14 year old girl that was abused two months ago. I feel like the oldest host in the park. And I have a responsibility to protect other girls. I have an appointment with a lawyer next week in order to start a criminal investigation into this man. I'm going to stop him. Support/encouragement would be appreciated? Edit: Fuck wow, thank you thank you for the outpouring of support. It breaks my heart how many similar stories there are out there. I wish I could hug every single one of you. I also wish I could post the asshole's name and where he lives, without the threat of a libel suit. (Even thought it's 100% true, that's the world we live in.) DM me if you have more advice, or just want to talk. It's a relief knowing I'm not alone. And now it kinda feels like I have an Imgur army behind me. Thank you so much. Edit2: https://me2csa.com/ is a site for adult survivors of abuse to anonymously identify their abusers. If an abuser has been named by more than one survivor, you will be notified. I just submitted, and I encourage others to do the same. Without being able to name our abusers publicly, this is the best shot we have in finding other victims and coming forward together.
item.dc:creator: HowDoesOneWeaveASigourney

item.title: The MAGA Twitter bots quickly started the "He's ANTIFA" based on his looks but surprise surprise...
item.description:
Wait for it....
He's probably not.
Forgive for seemingly making it political. My main goal is to counter what I saw from Twitter bots and what FoxPropaganda channel may attempt. Like they did with Jan 6th Trumpers...claiming it was the ANTIFA boogie man.
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

item.title: Go ahead and print it — Just In Case
item.description:
“I may not be good with facial expressions, but I know an evil doppelganger when I see one. Plus, your arm makes a noise every time you move it.” -Abed Nadir
Always be prepared.
item.dc:creator: harpti

item.title: The rockets red glare.
item.description: I was in Austin TX on holiday when obama got in in 08' and was living there in 12' when he got in again, left to come home in 15'. That's the America I remember, not this dystopian cheeto covered mess that the Trumpanzee created. It can be fixed! What happens in America does effect the rest of the world (as much as people like to think it doesnt) and I believe the world is a better place for it. America IS still the land of the free and home of the brave. Y'all earned it from us Brits by kicking the shit out of us at Yorktown, looks like the republicans are gonna try make you earn it again. REBEL! You have the home field advantage again, you got this!
item.dc:creator: Robbierocketman

item.title: We did the thing!
item.description:
I love her. I love y’all. You beautiful people of Imgur have been so supportive. The love and acceptance of this community for our last post shows what we are all about. Take a moment away from all the politics and insanity and just be happy with us.
I’m still pretty drunk. She shoved cake in my face.
My sister made this last minute.
item.dc:creator: illhaveaguinness

item.title: Don’t let the sun go down on meme - pt27
item.description:
I think this is a collection of headlines from the end of 2020. My favorite is the crabs one.
I ugly chuckled at this one
item.dc:creator: notyouraveragekatie

item.title: 4th of July celebrations
item.description: Political division and polarization is higher than ever, education system is a mess, fuckton of teachers are quitting, the handling of the pandemic even from the start was an embarrassment, black people killed by cops, anti-Asian violence is still strong (terrific article here: https://www.science.org/content/blog-post/stop-dismissing-anti-asian-racism, the trope of Asian Americans as the foreign “other” is a product of decades of targeted exclusion), apparently the Supreme Court thinks women should be brood mares for the state, reproductive rights are being threatened, not even the damn 4th of July itself can be celebrated in the streets depending on where you are because of some trigger happy madman. I can't believe how desensitized I've become to mass shootings. And remember how the police acted during like the billionth school shooting this time in Uvalde, it's like they wanted to help the shooter. But hey, at least you could hide your child in a dumpster! https://www.bbc.com/news/av/world-us-canada-62045720 There's too much shit to list.
item.dc:creator: RepairsGrowTails

item.title: Abortion Rights Protest March in Boston today
item.description:
This decision must not stand - Legal abortion across the land! We stopped for a Die-In : only chance I had to take a photo because my hands were busy carrying a banner for most of it
FRONT PAGE EDIT: Vote! Vote blue - or else this is the start of a horrendous landslide into Christi-fascism - also, drink water, you’re probably dehydrated
item.dc:creator: BurtMaklinFBI
